description: v0.15.1 trust-fix: service_role-key usage emits CRITICAL/CWE-639 from tenant-isolation-checker. Downstream scoring forces grade=F, score=0, blocked=true via the blocker-tier unification (critical + blocker now semantically equivalent). The canary-matcher asserts emission-layer only; the scoring layer is unit-tested in packages/core/__tests__/scoring.test.ts.
